text:
Q02B Employer, Union, or Retiree Health Coverage (Insurance) 
Please mark the box below for each type of health insurance that you have. 
ins_veteran FFS Q02C Veteran’s Benefits, also known as VA benefits 
Please mark the box below for each type of health insurance that you have. 
ins_military FFS Q02D Military Retiree Benefits, also known as Tricare 
Please mark the box below for each type of health insurance that you have. 
ins_medicaid FFS Q02E Medicaid, also known as State medical
